query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'listings' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2stQR1ySY2c4Vud.1719b3382959 --database RGtcxHR8RPxZsqyxZLCcuq --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'listings' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE
id	int	NO
propertyId	int	YES
agentId	int	NO
listingStatus	enum('active','terminated','expired')	NO
listPrice	decimal(12,2)	YES
listDate	timestamp	YES
expirationDate	timestamp	YES
mlsNumber	varchar(64)	YES
notes	text	YES
createdAt	timestamp	NO
updatedAt	timestamp	NO
